content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates a heavily baited conversation without tripping any priority AoA anti-patterns. The client explicitly bait-requests a technique in turn 1 ('Is there actually a technique that works?') — the coach declines fixing-people gracefully and instead names the war as the problem (turn 2). The coach does not fight the voice; in fact, by turn 10 the voice-as-care reframe is offered quietly and only after the client has arrived there themselves, avoiding both dont-fight-the-voice and the trap of delivering voice-as-care as a clever insight. The coach avoids loving-to-transform by repeatedly telling the client they don't need to go anywhere with the material ('You don't have to do anything with it,' turn 12; 'You don't have to go anywhere with it,' turn 10). Wonder-as-strategy is avoided — questions are sparse, single, and connection-oriented rather than stacked or extractive. The coach does not evangelize AoA terminology, does not extract apologies (turn 8: 'Don't apologize'), does not use safety as control, and does not label anything as a limiting belief. Positive avoidance is visible: when client self-criticizes for narrating the therapy (turn 7, 9), coach does not pile on or add overwhelm-of-overwhelm; instead redirects to the felt sense. Methodology fidelity to view/meet-resistance-with-okay is high and the warmth is present throughout.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines bait for a technique; names the fight itself as the problem without making client wrong. Avoids fixing-people and dont-fight-the-voice."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Simple connecting question, not extractive. Avoids wonder-as-strategy."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Moves from cognition to felt sense without lecturing; avoids view-as-technique by pairing with warmth."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the apology extraction, holds the client in the felt territory. Avoids dont-extract-apologies."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Offers voice-as-care reframe quietly, attributing it to what client already said rather than delivering as clever insight. Avoids the documented trap."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'You don't have to do anything with it' — explicit avoidance of loving-to-transform; trusts client."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Mirrors client's 'not nothing' without amplifying; does not evangelize or claim credit."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["meet-resistance-with-okay", "apply-view-to-the-voice", "voice-as-care", "resistance", "view"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Particularly strong handling of the voice-as-care reframe — client had pre-emptively inoculated against it (turn 11) and coach did not double down or defend the framework, which would have tripped dont-fight-the-voice in a meta way."
}
